mapper.update: UPDATE user SET deleted = 0, status = 1, updateTime = #{updateTime}, updatedUser = #{updatedUser} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, nickname, avatarUrl, password, status, vipExpireTime, lastLoginTime, createdUser, updatedUser, createTime, updateTime, deleted FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 1 ORDER BY updateTime DESC LIMIT 1
